item.title: The Case That Changed The Debate Around Dissociative Identity Disorder
item.description: Billy Milligan became the first person in the United States to be found not guilty by reason of insanity after his defense argued he had dissociative identity disorder. His case sparked decades of debate among mental health professionals, legal experts, and the public over criminal responsibility, psychiatric diagnoses, and the justice system.

media:content.media:title: The Case That Changed The Debate Around Dissociative Identity Disorder
media:content.media:description: Billy Milligan became the first person in the United States to be found not guilty by reason of insanity after his defense argued he had dissociative identity disorder. His case sparked decades of debate among mental health professionals, legal experts, and the public over criminal responsibility, psychiatric diagnoses, and the justice system.

item.title: A Wife’s Death Abroad Led To A Shocking Trial
item.description: In 2016, Bianca Rudolph died during a hunting trip in Zambia, and her death was initially ruled an accident. Years later, investigators uncovered new evidence that led to federal charges against her husband, Larry Rudolph. In 2022, a jury convicted him of crimes related to her death and an insurance fraud scheme, bringing a long running investigation to a dramatic conclusion.

media:content.media:title: A Wife’s Death Abroad Led To A Shocking Trial
media:content.media:description: In 2016, Bianca Rudolph died during a hunting trip in Zambia, and her death was initially ruled an accident. Years later, investigators uncovered new evidence that led to federal charges against her husband, Larry Rudolph. In 2022, a jury convicted him of crimes related to her death and an insurance fraud scheme, bringing a long running investigation to a dramatic conclusion.

item.title: Tim Allen’s Surprising Journey Before Becoming A Comedy Star
item.description: Long before becoming one of America's best known comedians and television stars, Tim Allen faced serious legal trouble that changed the course of his life. After serving time in federal prison following a drug trafficking conviction in the late 1970s, he rebuilt his career through stand up comedy before finding success on television and in film.

media:content.media:title: Tim Allen’s Surprising Journey Before Becoming A Comedy Star
media:content.media:description: Long before becoming one of America's best known comedians and television stars, Tim Allen faced serious legal trouble that changed the course of his life. After serving time in federal prison following a drug trafficking conviction in the late 1970s, he rebuilt his career through stand up comedy before finding success on television and in film.

item.title: A College Student’s Disappearance Took 26 Years To Resolve
item.description: Kristin Smart disappeared from California Polytechnic State University in 1996 after attending a campus party. For more than two decades, Paul Flores remained the primary suspect before being convicted in 2022 following a lengthy investigation and trial. The case became one of California’s most closely followed missing person investigations and highlighted the persistence of investigators and Smart’s family.

media:content.media:title: A College Student’s Disappearance Took 26 Years To Resolve
media:content.media:description: Kristin Smart disappeared from California Polytechnic State University in 1996 after attending a campus party. For more than two decades, Paul Flores remained the primary suspect before being convicted in 2022 following a lengthy investigation and trial. The case became one of California’s most closely followed missing person investigations and highlighted the persistence of investigators and Smart’s family.
